name: Godot Betsy Alpha Stitch
description: Pinned GLSL compute shader used by the open-source project porting demo.

adjustments.summary: Removed the Godot shader-section marker so the compute shader is standalone GLSL.
adjustments.detail: Godot stores compute shaders behind an engine-specific section marker. The marker is stripped so the slice is plain GLSL that the project pipeline can parse directly.

outOfScope: Godot shader-section markers and engine-side shader preprocessing
